summary: Web project with multiple city landing pages (Basel, Zürich). Google Tags are being integrated per page.
architectural_notes: Google Tag (AW-17916128725) integrated on Basel page
Google Tag (G-NQHZEVRPBL) to be integrated on Zürich page

existing_features.title: Inject Google Tag (gtag.js) with ID G-NQHZEVRPBL into the Zürich couples landing page (frontend/src/pages/ZurichCouplesLandingPage.tsx), scoped to that page only. Follow the same pattern used on the Basel couples landing page (BaselCouplesLandingPage.tsx), where a <script> tag loads https://www.googletagmanager.com/gtag/js?id=G-NQHZEVRPBL and an inline initialization script calls window.dataLayer and gtag('config', 'G-NQHZEVRPBL'). Use React Helmet or equivalent head-injection mechanism already in use on the Basel page.

new_feature_requests.summary: Integrate Google Tag G-NQHZEVRPBL on the Zürich page
